title: T6 Constellation: AngelEye revival — launchd daemon + hook re-install against current Claude Code
prompt: Revive AngelEye (~/dev/ad/apps/angeleye — Claude Code session telemetry sentinel, dark since ~2026-06-29; server dark on :5051, zero AngelEye hooks in ~/.claude/settings.json at authoring). Rebuild the stale workspaces; daemonize via a launchd LaunchAgent com.appydave.angeleye (KeepAlive + RunAtLoad, WorkingDirectory MUST be the server/ subdir per the cwd contract, NODE_ENV=production so API + built client UI serve together on :5051); re-install curl-transport command hooks into ~/.claude/settings.json using the server's own GET /api/hooks/supported register list (expect 28 events) — NEVER the stale 24-event ~/.claude/skills/angeleye-install skill and NEVER the WorktreeCreate event (registering it breaks worktree creation machine-wide); preserve the two non-AngelEye hooks (buggered UserPromptSubmit, playwright-screenshot PostToolUse) byte-for-byte with a backup-restore discipline; prove live ingestion with one short-lived interactive claude in a throwaway tmux session (angeleye-wg-probe, never -p/headless — then kill it); force-resync the ~980MB store via POST /api/sync?force=true; rewrite the stale install skill to consume /api/hooks/supported with a WorktreeCreate warning; commit+push the angeleye repo (tracked plist + .env.example) and append a status section to dark-factory backlog/2026-06-06-angeleye-refresh.md (items 1+2 done, 3-6 open). Out of scope: classification overlay, store pruning, MCP surface, Watchtower feed, EVENT_MAP extensions, engine edits. This unblocks T5-03 Fork F2-B and T7 usage telemetry. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T6-04-angeleye-revival.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: launchctl print gui/$(id -u)/com.appydave.angeleye shows state = running with no manual start; curl http://127.0.0.1:5051/health returns status ok and curl http://127.0.0.1:5051/ serves the built client index.html (production mode proven); ~/.claude/settings.json is valid JSON where every event in GET /api/hooks/supported's register array carries a localhost:5051 curl command hook, WorktreeCreate appears zero times, and the buggered-detect UserPromptSubmit + browser_take_screenshot PostToolUse entries survive verbatim (settings.json.wg-t6-04.bak exists). Live round trip: starting a throwaway interactive claude in tmux session angeleye-wg-probe adds a new session-*.jsonl under ~/.claude/angeleye/sessions within ~30s, and the probe session is killed and gone afterwards ('tmux ls | grep -c angeleye-wg-probe' ends at 0). ~/.claude/skills/angeleye-install/SKILL.md now references api/hooks/supported and warns against WorktreeCreate. Shipped: feat(daemon) commit pushed in the angeleye repo containing scripts/launchd/com.appydave.angeleye.plist (plutil -lint OK) and the .env.example NODE_ENV note; dark-factory backlog/2026-06-06-angeleye-refresh.md gained a wg-t6-04 status section and is committed. Negative: $AE/.env still has PORT=5051, 'tmux ls | grep -c df-worker' unchanged at 0, dark-factory git clean apart from the backlog commit and any needs-decision park files, and no edits under angeleye's untracked strangers (.claude/settings.json, docs/planning/worktree-hook-passthrough-fix.md, memory/). Fork-dependent: pre-existing red tests at baseline gate only 'not worse' (F3-B, named in commit body); a structural hook-firing break parks to needs-decision with the evidence trio rather than guessing (F2-B).
